coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 20:21 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 20:21 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 33s at 220%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/5. 200-220% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Alternating. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 33s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 200-220%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Alternating. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 6:03 at 50%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 50% FTP, Seated. 6:03. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 50%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 50% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 50% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 200% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:33 at 200%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 49% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3/5. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 180-200%, Cadence: 95-110 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 50% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/5. 50-50% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/5. 6:03 at 50%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 50% × 6:03. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 180% for 1:06. Then 20min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 180% × 1:06. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:06 at 180%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 180% for 1:06. Then 20min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 180% × 1:06. Seated, 95-110 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 63% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
